zh.of Dukenfield, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾度金費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Dukinfield於1380年出生在英國爾度金費爾德時，他的父親Thurstan Dukinfield21歲，母親Margaret Foljambe15歲。他於1405年之前與Ellen Brereton在英國英格蘭爾度金費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國爾度金費爾德。

zh-hans.of Dukenfield, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾度金費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Dukinfield于1380年出生在英国爾度金費爾德时，他的父亲Thurstan Dukinfield21岁，母亲Margaret Foljambe15岁。他于1405年之前与Ellen Brereton在英国英格兰爾度金費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国爾度金費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Dukinfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Dukinfield was born in 1380, in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England, his father, Thurstan Dukinfield, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Foljambe, was 15. He married Ellen Brereton before 1405, in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1442, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Dukinfield est né en 1380, à Dukinfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thurstan Dukinfield, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Foljambe, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Brereton avant 1405, à Dukinfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1442, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Dukinfield, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Dukinfield 1380 in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurstan Dukinfield 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Foljambe 15. Er hat vor 1405 in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1442 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Dukinfield, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Dukinfield è nato il nel 1380 nel Dukinfield, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Thurstan Dukinfield, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Foljambe, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Brereton prima del 1405, nel Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1442, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Dukinfield, Cheshire, England.

ja.Dukinfield, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアダキンフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Dukinfieldが1380年にイギリスチェシュアイアダキンフィールドで生まれた時，父Thurstan Dukinfieldは21歳，母Margaret Foljambeは15歳であった。1405年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダキンフィールドでEllen Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアダキンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Dukinfield(이)가 1380년 영국 체실르 드킨필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurstan Dukinfield(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Foljambe(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1405년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드킨필드에서 Ellen Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 드킨필드에 묻혔다.

mn.of Dukenfield, Cheshire, England: Dukinfield, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Dukinfield nasceu em 1380, em Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thurstan Dukinfield, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Foljambe, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Brereton antes 1405, em Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1442, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Dukinfield родился в 1380 г. в местности дукинфиелд, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thurstan Dukinfield было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Foljambe, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Brereton перед 1405 г. в местности дукинфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1442 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности дукинфиелд, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Dukinfield nació en 1380, en Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thurstan Dukinfield, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Foljambe, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Ellen Brereton antes de 1405, en Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1442, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Dukinfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
